scripts.build: bun run check && bun run build:force
scripts.check: bun run check:md && bun run check:prettier && bun run check:py
scripts.check:py: uv run --locked ruff check && uv run --locked ruff format --check && uv run --locked ty check
scripts.format: bun run format:md && bun run format:prettier && bun run format:py
scripts.format:py: uv run --locked ruff check --fix && uv run --locked ruff format && uv run --locked ty check
scripts.prepare: (uv sync || true) && bun x --package if-ci -- if-not-ci husky
